_notes.file: Human settlement generation tables: where sites are, what they do, who controls them, what is wrong, and what scenes they offer.
_notes.editing: Entries should be concrete enough to create playable pressure. Keep labels stable when referenced by compatibility maps, tag hooks, or tests.

sections.siteCategories: Canonical settlement site categories used by validation and compatibility maps.
sections.locations: Specific location labels grouped by placement pool; each label declares its site category.
sections.functionPools: Settlement functions grouped by physical or narrative context.
sections.guFractureFunctionsBySiteCategory: Function overrides favored when GU intensity is dangerous or fractured.
sections.builtForms: Habitat/building forms constrained by site category, exact location, mobility, and mining use.
sections.authorities: Political, corporate, military, civic, or illicit powers that can run a site.
sections.authorityByHabitationPattern: Authority overrides keyed by habitation pattern (Automated, Abandoned).
sections.conditions: Current visible operating state of a settlement.
sections.conditionByHabitationPattern: Condition overrides keyed by habitation pattern (Automated, Abandoned).
sections.tags: Two-tag prompt pool; each tag carries a pressure phrase for hook synthesis.
sections.tagPairHooks: Specific connective tissue for known tag combinations.
sections.crises: Open crisis pool for inhabited sites.
sections.crisisByHabitationPattern: Crisis overrides keyed by habitation pattern (Automated, Abandoned).
sections.hiddenTruths: Secret or buried truth pool for inhabited sites.
sections.hiddenTruthByHabitationPattern: Hidden-truth overrides keyed by habitation pattern (Automated, Abandoned).
sections.encounterSitesByHabitationPattern: Encounter-site overrides keyed by habitation pattern (Automated, Abandoned).
sections.encounterSitesByFunctionKeyword: Function-keyword rules that add specialized encounter sites.
sections.populationTable: d10 settlement population table (magnitude only). Top two slots both map to 10+ million so high-presence systems favor large urban centers; Unknown is reserved for the Abandoned joint constraint and never rolled organically.
sections.habitationPatternDefaults: Default habitation pattern derived from siteCategory.

aiSituations: No AI; dangerously manual
Obsolete but loyal AI
Overworked single AI
Multiple narrow AIs in stable partition
AI heavily censored after incident
AI speaks only through approved operators
AI is beloved as local crew
AI treated as property
AI manages life support flawlessly
AI handles navigation/traffic only
AI controls mining drones
AI controls security
AI has memory gaps
AI predicts bleed shifts too well
AI refuses certain commands
AI gives contradictory but valid advice
AI has a hidden emergency protocol
AI is being illegally expanded
AI has split into rival task-fragments
AI is compromised by chiral contamination
AI hallucinates during metric storms
AI is under corporate remote override
AI is being interrogated by investigators
AI wants evacuation but cannot say why
AI is the only witness to a disaster
AI is protecting illegal residents
AI is running the settlement better than humans admit
AI is blamed for human corruption
AI may trigger Gardener attention if pushed
AI was cut down from a more capable illegal architecture
AI is missing
AI has been replaced by an impostor system
AI runs a secret simulation of the settlement
AI is obeying old first-wave orders
AI is loyal to the wrong authority
AI is one bad command away from catastrophe
conditions: Split between surface and orbital populations
Hidden reason it cannot be abandoned

tags.label: Abandoned First Wave
tags.pressure: old first-wave decisions still decide who has shelter, air, and legal standing.

tags.label: Air Is Money
tags.pressure: life support has become the settlement currency and the main lever of control.

tags.label: AI Whisper Cult
tags.pressure: residents read spiritual or political meaning into narrow-AI behavior.

tags.label: Anti-Corporate Commune
tags.pressure: the public story hides a working political break with corporate control.

tags.label: Aristocratic Dome
tags.pressure: elite protection and outside deprivation are tied together.

tags.label: Automated but Haunted
tags.pressure: old automation keeps producing patterns locals treat as messages.

tags.label: Bleed-Chaser Port
tags.pressure: travel, debt, and risk all orbit the next moving bleed opportunity.

tags.label: Border Fort
tags.pressure: military necessity is being used to justify civilian restrictions.

tags.label: Broken Terraformer
tags.pressure: a failed environmental project is still shaping the crisis.

tags.label: Chiral Monopoly
tags.pressure: one faction controls access to the resource everyone needs.

tags.label: Debt Labor
tags.pressure: contracts and life-support fees make departure functionally impossible.

tags.label: Deep Ice
tags.pressure: buried volatiles or under-ice habitats conceal the real value of the site.

tags.label: Derelict Yard
tags.pressure: salvage law and old wreckage hide the deeper conflict.

tags.label: Elegant Core Enclave
tags.pressure: polished public spaces mask a harsher dependent economy.

tags.label: Exile Haven
tags.pressure: people with incompatible pasts are forced to rely on each other.

tags.label: Flare Refuge
tags.pressure: survival protocols double as social control.

tags.label: Free Captain Nest
tags.pressure: independent crews set the local law when formal authority fails.

tags.label: Gate Shadow
tags.pressure: route access determines who prospers and who is trapped.

tags.label: Ghost City, Human
tags.pressure: the haunting is human history, not the supernatural.

tags.label: High-G Research
tags.pressure: dangerous science is being treated as necessary infrastructure.

tags.label: Hidden Navy
tags.pressure: military presence is deeper than the public registry admits.

tags.label: Hydrocarbon Frontier
tags.pressure: volatile extraction keeps everyone solvent and vulnerable.

tags.label: Kessler Cloud
tags.pressure: debris hazards make movement, rescue, and evacuation political.

tags.label: Machine-Run Town
tags.pressure: humans depend on systems they do not fully control.

tags.label: Memory-Loss Zone
tags.pressure: missing records and altered recollections decide the dispute.

tags.label: Migrant Swarm
tags.pressure: temporary populations outnumber the institutions meant to govern them.

tags.label: Moving Node Rush
tags.pressure: short-lived opportunity is pushing people into unsafe choices.

tags.label: Narrow-AI Schism
tags.pressure: AIs agree on facts but not on which human orders can be obeyed.

tags.label: Old War Minefield
tags.pressure: legacy weapons make ordinary operations into negotiations.

tags.label: Outlaw Court
tags.pressure: local justice answers to power before law.

tags.label: Penal Extraction
tags.pressure: punishment and resource production are the same system.

tags.label: Perfect Dome, Rotten Outside
tags.pressure: comfort inside depends on sacrifice outside.

tags.label: Plague/Biosafety Fear
tags.pressure: containment policy is shaping every personal choice.

tags.label: Precious Water
tags.pressure: water ownership is the settlement constitution.

tags.label: Religious Geometry
tags.pressure: belief and GU observation are tangled in local politics.

tags.label: Strikebreaker City
tags.pressure: labor peace is being maintained by coercion.

tags.label: Archive War
tags.pressure: whoever controls the records controls legal truth, casualty counts, and property claims.

tags.label: Broken Mirror Swarm
tags.pressure: failed terraforming hardware still decides climate, power, and blame.

tags.label: False Evacuation List
tags.pressure: survival priority was assigned by a list nobody trusts.

tags.label: Gardener Compliance Zone
tags.pressure: opaque Sol/Gardener rules can override local law without explanation.

tags.label: Life-Support Union
tags.pressure: repair crews can save or freeze the whole settlement by choosing where work stops.

tags.label: Medical Triage State
tags.pressure: clinic decisions have become law because exposure and scarcity decide who gets treated.

tags.label: Route Weather Board
tags.pressure: safe windows are forecasts, markets, and political weapons at the same time.

tags.label: Spare Parts Monarchy
tags.pressure: control of replacement parts has hardened into hereditary or cartel power.

tags.label: Storm Shelter Politics
tags.pressure: the shelter plan reveals whose lives the settlement values first.

tags.label: Terraforming Liability
tags.pressure: old climate promises have become debts, lawsuits, and bodies.

tags.label: Exposure Records Sealed
tags.pressure: medical truth is being hidden to protect authority or prevent panic.

tags.label: Interdiction Profiteers
tags.pressure: some locals profit whenever Sol/Gardener fear closes routes.

tags.label: AI Witness Custody
tags.pressure: a narrow AI can prove what happened, so every faction wants lawful control of it.

tags.label: Shelter Lottery
tags.pressure: storm shelter access is allocated by a lottery everyone suspects is rigged.

tags.label: Route Tithe
tags.pressure: every safe transit window is taxed before anyone knows whether it will hold.

tags.label: Clinic Black Market
tags.pressure: treatment, exposure data, and medical chirality stock all move off-book.

tagPairHooks.Air Is Money + Debt Labor: Air Is Money is visible in every meter and airlock; Debt Labor means workers cannot afford passage out.
tagPairHooks.Air Is Money + Precious Water: Air Is Money prices every breath; Precious Water prices every cup, forcing crews to choose which ration ledger to steal or defend.
tagPairHooks.Air Is Money + Life-Support Union: Air Is Money makes meters law; Life-Support Union can shut those meters off, turning every strike into a hostage negotiation.
tagPairHooks.Air Is Money + Shelter Lottery: Air Is Money keeps poor families near suffocation; Shelter Lottery decides which of them also lose storm protection.
tagPairHooks.Bleed-Chaser Port + Narrow-AI Schism: Bleed-Chaser Port draws ships racing moving nodes; Narrow-AI Schism means local AIs disagree over which predictions are safe.
tagPairHooks.Bleed-Chaser Port + Archive War: Bleed-Chaser Port fills with transient claims; Archive War turns lost manifests into weapons against crews already gone.
tagPairHooks.Bleed-Chaser Port + AI Witness Custody: Bleed-Chaser Port rewards speed over procedure; AI Witness Custody freezes the one recorder that can prove a fatal shortcut.
tagPairHooks.Perfect Dome, Rotten Outside + Chiral Mo: Perfect Dome, Rotten Outside is the public shape; Chiral Monopoly is the toxic extraction chain everyone outside the dome must endure.
tagPairHooks.Flare Refuge + Storm Shelter Politics: Flare Refuge makes shelter discipline normal; Storm Shelter Politics decides whose names vanish when capacity runs out.
tagPairHooks.Flare Refuge + Aristocratic Dome: Flare Refuge drills everyone for equal disaster; Aristocratic Dome quietly preserves private bunkers, cleaner filters, and earlier warnings.
tagPairHooks.Broken Terraformer + Terraforming Liabil: Broken Terraformer is the visible wreck; Terraforming Liability is the reason nobody can admit the project failed.
tagPairHooks.Broken Terraformer + Broken Mirror Swarm: Broken Terraformer is failing on the ground; Broken Mirror Swarm keeps changing the sky before repairs can hold.
tagPairHooks.Broken Terraformer + Plague/Biosafety Fe: Broken Terraformer released the wrong ecology; Plague/Biosafety Fear decides who gets quarantined before anyone proves exposure.
tagPairHooks.Broken Terraformer + Deep Ice: Broken Terraformer failed above the surface; Deep Ice hides the reserve that could save the settlement or condemn it.
tagPairHooks.Gate Shadow + Route Weather Board: Gate Shadow controls access; Route Weather Board controls the forecast everyone must pretend is neutral.
tagPairHooks.Gate Shadow + Route Tithe: Gate Shadow lets brokers decide who reaches the route; Route Tithe turns every permission stamp into a public shakedown.
tagPairHooks.Gate Shadow + Gardener Compliance Zone: Gate Shadow makes access scarce; Gardener Compliance Zone lets officials blame opaque Sol/Gardener rules for every profitable denial.
tagPairHooks.Gate Shadow + Interdiction Profiteers: Gate Shadow traps travelers at the chokepoint; Interdiction Profiteers get richer each time fear keeps the gates closed.
tagPairHooks.Gate Shadow + Archive War: Gate Shadow decides who can leave; Archive War decides which stranded claims still exist when the route reopens.
tagPairHooks.Gate Shadow + AI Witness Custody: Gate Shadow keeps witnesses bottled up; AI Witness Custody makes one machine's travel logs more dangerous than any passenger.
tagPairHooks.Gate Shadow + Moving Node Rush: Gate Shadow rations access to the route; Moving Node Rush makes every delayed departure feel like theft.
tagPairHooks.Memory-Loss Zone + Archive War: Memory-Loss Zone breaks testimony; Archive War makes surviving records more valuable than witnesses.
tagPairHooks.Memory-Loss Zone + Outlaw Court: Memory-Loss Zone weakens every testimony; Outlaw Court fills the gap with verdicts backed by debt and force.
tagPairHooks.AI Whisper Cult + AI Witness Custody: AI Whisper Cult turns machine behavior into meaning; AI Witness Custody turns that same machine into evidence.
tagPairHooks.Medical Triage State + Exposure Records: Medical Triage State rules the public crisis; Exposure Records Sealed explains why trust is collapsing.
tagPairHooks.Gardener Compliance Zone + Interdiction: Gardener Compliance Zone gives fear legal teeth; Interdiction Profiteers make sure the fear keeps paying.
tagPairHooks.Gardener Compliance Zone + Archive War: Gardener Compliance Zone hides behind untouchable orders; Archive War decides which human records can still contest them.
tagPairHooks.Gardener Compliance Zone + AI Witness Cu: Gardener Compliance Zone can override local courts; AI Witness Custody holds the narrow AI that watched the override happen.
tagPairHooks.Spare Parts Monarchy + Life-Support Unio: Spare Parts Monarchy owns the inventory; Life-Support Union knows which failing system matters first.
tagPairHooks.Spare Parts Monarchy + Shelter Lottery: Spare Parts Monarchy controls replacement seals; Shelter Lottery turns every missing gasket into an argument over whose family gets sealed inside.
tagPairHooks.Spare Parts Monarchy + Aristocratic Dome: Spare Parts Monarchy hoards the failing components; Aristocratic Dome spends them first on elite comfort while outer pumps scream.
tagPairHooks.False Evacuation List + Migrant Swarm: False Evacuation List is the betrayal; Migrant Swarm is everyone still alive enough to contest it.
tagPairHooks.False Evacuation List + Border Fort: False Evacuation List names the expendable; Border Fort gives armed officers a reason to enforce the lie at the gates.
tagPairHooks.False Evacuation List + Hidden Navy: False Evacuation List explains missing civilians; Hidden Navy suggests the evacuation capacity went somewhere the public was never meant to see.
tagPairHooks.Route Tithe + Bleed-Chaser Port: Route Tithe taxes each safe window; Bleed-Chaser Port keeps desperate crews coming anyway.
tagPairHooks.Route Tithe + Gardener Compliance Zone: Route Tithe extracts money from each passage; Gardener Compliance Zone gives the tax a rulebook nobody can challenge.
tagPairHooks.Route Tithe + Outlaw Court: Route Tithe makes transit debt unavoidable; Outlaw Court punishes those who refuse payment before any lawful appeal exists.
tagPairHooks.Clinic Black Market + Plague/Biosafety F: Clinic Black Market supplies what law withholds; Plague/Biosafety Fear makes every dose a political act.
tagPairHooks.Clinic Black Market + Exposure Records S: Clinic Black Market sells treatment without questions; Exposure Records Sealed makes honest diagnosis dangerous for patients, doctors, and witnesses.
tagPairHooks.Clinic Black Market + Flare Refuge: Clinic Black Market trades in anti-rad stockpiles; Flare Refuge lets officials call every stolen vial a threat to shelter discipline.
tagPairHooks.Archive War + Outlaw Court: Archive War decides what counts as true; Outlaw Court decides who pays before truth arrives.
tagPairHooks.Archive War + AI Witness Custody: Archive War corrupts the paper trail; AI Witness Custody makes one narrow AI the last admissible memory.
tagPairHooks.Precious Water + Clinic Black Market: Precious Water controls public obedience; Clinic Black Market moves clean bags and stolen filters to anyone willing to betray the queue.
tagPairHooks.Precious Water + Migrant Swarm: Precious Water makes citizenship measurable in liters; Migrant Swarm brings more mouths than the charter ever planned to recognize.
tagPairHooks.Precious Water + Aristocratic Dome: Precious Water sustains the dome gardens; Aristocratic Dome makes the dry districts watch nobles waste what could keep children alive.
tagPairHooks.Life-Support Union + Border Fort: Life-Support Union can stop the vents; Border Fort commanders call that sabotage whenever civilian repairs interfere with security orders.
tagPairHooks.Life-Support Union + Hidden Navy: Life-Support Union knows which decks are drawing impossible power; Hidden Navy needs those workers quiet before anyone maps the concealed berths.
tagPairHooks.Storm Shelter Politics + False Evacuatio: Storm Shelter Politics decides the legal priority order; False Evacuation List proves someone rewrote survival before the sirens sounded.
tagPairHooks.Storm Shelter Politics + Migrant Swarm: Storm Shelter Politics was built for registered households; Migrant Swarm forces officials to count strangers while residents guard the doors.
tagPairHooks.Shelter Lottery + False Evacuation List: Shelter Lottery claims chance still rules; False Evacuation List reveals the winning numbers were assigned before the drawing.
tagPairHooks.Shelter Lottery + Exile Haven: Shelter Lottery divides scarce refuge by ticket; Exile Haven means half the claimants are people other settlements already sacrificed.
tagPairHooks.Exposure Records Sealed + Flare Refuge: Exposure Records Sealed hides who was already poisoned; Flare Refuge forces those same names into shared shelters when the warning comes.
tagPairHooks.Exposure Records Sealed + Aristocratic D: Exposure Records Sealed protects the official timeline; Aristocratic Dome protects the families most likely to have ordered the cover-up.
tagPairHooks.Migrant Swarm + Border Fort: Migrant Swarm overwhelms intake rules; Border Fort commanders decide which refugees become workers, detainees, informants, or warning shots.
tagPairHooks.Migrant Swarm + Flare Refuge: Migrant Swarm brings unregistered bodies to the shelters; Flare Refuge protocols let officials ration mercy as a safety measure.
tagPairHooks.Exile Haven + Hidden Navy: Exile Haven shelters people with dangerous histories; Hidden Navy recruits from them, then denies the settlement any right to ask.
tagPairHooks.Exile Haven + Border Fort: Exile Haven promises second chances; Border Fort turns every old warrant and faction grudge into leverage at the checkpoint.
tagPairHooks.Route Weather Board + Route Tithe: Route Weather Board names the safe windows; Route Tithe ensures every forecast becomes a taxable political favor.
tagPairHooks.Route Weather Board + Interdiction Profi: Route Weather Board can call a route unsafe; Interdiction Profiteers profit whenever that warning freezes competitors in place.
tagPairHooks.Route Weather Board + AI Witness Custody: Route Weather Board wants the forecast accepted; AI Witness Custody holds the machine logs proving who falsified risk.
tagPairHooks.Route Weather Board + Memory-Loss Zone: Route Weather Board depends on remembered patterns; Memory-Loss Zone leaves crews arguing over whether the last warning ever happened.
tagPairHooks.Moving Node Rush + Interdiction Profitee: Moving Node Rush pushes crews toward bad odds; Interdiction Profiteers sell delay, clearance, and panic as separate services.
tagPairHooks.Moving Node Rush + Memory-Loss Zone: Moving Node Rush leaves no time to verify events; Memory-Loss Zone makes yesterday's decisions impossible to prosecute.
tagPairHooks.Moving Node Rush + AI Whisper Cult: Moving Node Rush turns timing into obsession; AI Whisper Cult treats every machine prediction as a commandment.
tagPairHooks.Religious Geometry + Route Weather Board: Religious Geometry gives routes sacred meaning; Route Weather Board lets technicians decide when faith must wait.
tagPairHooks.Religious Geometry + AI Whisper Cult: Religious Geometry sanctifies observed patterns; AI Whisper Cult gives those patterns a machine voice and a factional agenda.
tagPairHooks.Narrow-AI Schism + Automated but Haunted: Narrow-AI Schism divides machine authority; Automated but Haunted keeps producing evidence neither side can comfortably explain.
tagPairHooks.Debt Labor + Penal Extraction: Debt Labor traps workers in the contract; Penal Extraction lets authorities call the same captivity a lawful sentence.
tagPairHooks.Debt Labor + Strikebreaker City: Debt Labor keeps departures impossible; Strikebreaker City makes every demand for relief look like sabotage.
tagPairHooks.Debt Labor + Chiral Monopoly: Debt Labor binds the workforce to fees; Chiral Monopoly controls the medicine and materials that keep those debts growing.
tagPairHooks.Debt Labor + Hydrocarbon Frontier: Debt Labor supplies expendable crews; Hydrocarbon Frontier ensures each profitable burn, leak, and blast creates new arrears.
tagPairHooks.Debt Labor + Anti-Corporate Commune: Debt Labor is the grievance everyone names; Anti-Corporate Commune is the risky promise that debts can be collectively refused.
tagPairHooks.Debt Labor + Free Captain Nest: Debt Labor fills the docks with fugitives; Free Captain Nest decides which escape contracts are rescue and which are resale.
tagPairHooks.Penal Extraction + Hydrocarbon Frontier: Penal Extraction turns sentences into shifts; Hydrocarbon Frontier makes every safety shutdown a fight over quotas.
tagPairHooks.Penal Extraction + Chiral Monopoly: Penal Extraction supplies captive hands; Chiral Monopoly gives the warden faction control over the only treatment that keeps them useful.
tagPairHooks.Penal Extraction + Broken Terraformer: Penal Extraction sends prisoners into the ruins; Broken Terraformer makes each work detail part repair crew, part casualty list.
tagPairHooks.Strikebreaker City + Hydrocarbon Frontie: Strikebreaker City keeps crews working under guard; Hydrocarbon Frontier makes one halted pump enough to bankrupt half the settlement.
tagPairHooks.Strikebreaker City + Anti-Corporate Comm: Strikebreaker City criminalizes solidarity; Anti-Corporate Commune keeps proving the strike has a political home.
tagPairHooks.Strikebreaker City + Life-Support Union: Strikebreaker City can seize the streets; Life-Support Union can still decide which seized block keeps breathing.
tagPairHooks.Chiral Monopoly + Plague/Biosafety Fear: Chiral Monopoly controls the approved supply; Plague/Biosafety Fear lets rivals be labeled contamination risks before they can compete.
tagPairHooks.Hydrocarbon Frontier + Plague/Biosafety: Hydrocarbon Frontier keeps the settlement solvent; Plague/Biosafety Fear makes every cough near the rigs a shutdown threat.
tagPairHooks.Free Captain Nest + Hydrocarbon Frontier: Free Captain Nest writes dockside law; Hydrocarbon Frontier gives every crew a reason to smuggle fuel, parts, and people.
tagPairHooks.Terraforming Liability + Perfect Dome, R: Terraforming Liability names the unpaid harm; Perfect Dome, Rotten Outside shows exactly who was protected from it.
tagPairHooks.Terraforming Liability + Plague/Biosafet: Terraforming Liability turns exposure into evidence; Plague/Biosafety Fear gives every claimant a reason to hide symptoms.

crises: Sabotage of the refinery, gate, or AI systems
The base broadcasts two contradictory distress calls
Everyone is lying about casualty numbers
Crisis is staged to hide something worse
Safe transit window sold to too many ships
Radiator field sabotage is heating the settlement
Exposure clinic overflow spills into public corridors
Terraforming mirrors begin an unsafe correction burn
Imported volatile tanks are legally frozen
Sol/Gardener compliance team seizes the port
Interdiction warning contradicts the published route plan
Archive court releases two incompatible rulings
AI witness testimony becomes publicly accessible
Maintenance logs prove the disaster was forecast
Evacuation ark launches without most of its manifest
hiddenTruths: The settlement is insolvent
The mine is nearly exhausted
The resource is richer than reported
The hazard is artificial/human-caused
The official death toll is false
The founders committed a crime
Corporate records were altered
The local AI deleted evidence
The local AI preserved forbidden evidence
The base is built on unstable ground/orbit
The settlement cannot survive evacuation
The workers are legally trapped
The site is a weapons lab
The site is an illegal AI lab
The site is a black prison
The site is a military listening post
The site is a fake colony masking extraction
The site is a smuggling hub
A first-wave expedition survived in hiding
The ghosts are old human recordings
The curse is chiral neurochemistry
The miracle is illegal terraforming tech
The supposed unknown signal is human encryption
The artifact rumor is a natural GU formation
The Gardener has already intervened once
Sol interdiction files are sealed here
A faction is provoking Gardener attention
The Iggygate is misaligned on purpose
The bleed node is being illegally stabilized
The settlement has an evacuation ark nobody knows about
The leader is a proxy for a distant faction
The pirate threat is staged
The quarantine is political
The plague is industrial poisoning
The AI is sane; the humans are not listening
The system official survey is deliberately wrong
The route weather board sells safe windows twice
The flare forecast was softened to keep traffic moving
The shelter lottery excludes an entire labor district
The life-support board is cannibalizing abandoned sections
The spare-parts shortage is a manufactured monopoly
The maintenance logs were rewritten after the breach
The clinic is hiding a second exposure syndrome
The medical stockpile was traded for route access
The terraforming directorate falsified the climate model
The mirror swarm is being kept broken for legal leverage
The imported volatiles belong to refugees on paper
The Sol/Gardener warning was copied from another system
The compliance office is protecting a private interdiction deal
The archive court knows both claimants are using forged records
The AI witness has already testified in a sealed simulation
The evacuation ark manifest contains people who never existed
The casualty register merges two different disasters
The official quarantine boundary protects an illegal facility
encounterSites: Half-flooded maintenance tunnels the pumps haven't worked in since the contract dispute
Shielding crawlspace district where the pressure boundary runs two seams off the schematic
Dockside free market run by stevedores who price in whichever currency the dock's currently sworn to
Drone hangar with three locked bays nobody on shift has clearance for
AI core vault sealed under three jurisdictions, none of them current
Chiral refinery floor where the wrong-handed product cabinet was inventoried twice last week
Bleed-harvest control room with a console nobody on payroll knows the password for
Closed habitat ring listed as decommissioned and still drawing reactor heat
Quarantine ward whose patient roster grows faster than the intake log accounts for
Black-market clinic stocked with chiral medicine the port's import ledger denies
Corporate executive dome whose registered occupant has not been seen in eleven shifts
Worker barracks with one bunk kept made up for six months and no name on the rota
Religious geometry chapel whose attendance jumped the week the warning beacon woke up
Old first-wave command bunker still accepting authentication from one extinct call sign
Illegal pinchdrive test chamber whose regulator seal was broken and replaced a quarter-turn off
Radiation storm shelter rebuilt over an older shelter on a footprint nobody will discuss
Water plant pumping a chiral mix the public assays don't list
Courtroom and debt registry where one judge's seat was vacated mid-docket two cycles ago
Hidden launch bay whose hangar door shows fresh scrape marks against a flight log that lists no launches
Place the maps say does not exist that two unrelated crews independently use as a meeting point
Route weather board whose green windows always come ten minutes early on Tuesday shifts
Pinch forecast pit where one of the boards went green for ninety seconds last week
Stormbound customs queue stalled three days on a manifest no clerk will sign
Life-support spine whose redundancy switched off voluntarily during the last drill
Radiator field access lock with a shift rotation that doesn't appear in any roster
Shipyard parts cage whose inventory count and weight count haven't matched in a quarter
Exposure clinic running a triage protocol nobody on the medical board signed off on
Medical stock vault one combination lock short of what the audit expects
Triage lottery hall where the daily list goes up at noon and the riot starts at twelve-fifteen
Dead mirror-control room whose status board shows three mirrors still tracking
Failed garden dome breached on the inside and welded shut from the outside
Volatile import manifold running a feed line that doesn't terminate at any registered tank
Sol/Gardener compliance archive whose cross-references all loop back to one redacted page
Exclusion picket command deck where the duty officer's chair has a different ID this week
AI witness vault whose seal log shows one access during the last blackout nobody admits to
Public casualty register two names short of the figure the local media reported
Sealed evidence room with a chain-of-custody that lost two signatures during the last relay
Evacuation ark manifest office where the section totals balance and the grand total still doesn't
Transit lock overflow where the queue priority is set by a board nobody admits to operating
Debt court queue stretching eight hours the morning after every freighter offloads
District triage line whose intake desk has been quietly reassigning case priorities
Subway shelter platform redrawn to a layout the engineering office hasn't ratified
Mass-clinic intake corridor running on a power tap that doesn't show in the meter ledger
Town hall annex whose public-comment book is missing pages that were there last week
Open-air market dock where every vendor permit clears under one arbitrator's signature
Single-bay clinic backed by a medical stock the registered doctor never ordered
Single-room briefing cell with a corner sensor still recording after every officially closed session
Shared mess that doubles as a hearing where the kitchen rota and the witness rota run in lockstep
Two-key vault whose last access names a co-signer who has been off-station six weeks
Reactor coolant gallery patrolled by a maintenance team the staffing budget doesn't fund
Salvage broker's parlor whose ledger pages are dated for an upcoming week
Chiral foundry with a slag pile that returns better assays than the official ore
AI confessor's booth whose silent counter ticks once for every visitor and twice for some
Insurance assessor's office where the open files outnumber the signed claims four to one
Smuggler's quiet bar whose back-room schedule matches the customs blackout windows
Hydroponic crop deck running a strain the seed registry has never approved
Funeral broadcast room whose memorial loop adds one name a week the registry doesn't have
Ration-token printing office on a press that hasn't been audited since the last governor
Defaulted shipyard berth still occupied, still drawing reactor stand-by, still uninspected
Charter court with two competing claim seals and one judge willing to sit only one of them
Salvage tug crew quarters where the bunk count and meal count haven't matched in months
Refugee dormitory whose headcount runs five over the manifest by every shift change
Generation-ship dock whose passenger ledger lists three children unborn at filing
AI service chapel whose tended AI now lags real-time by twelve seconds and counting
Field commissary running a parallel mess line for crew not on the duty roster
Quarantine clearance gate whose green light has been overridden manually six times this month
Concourse vendor stalls under a moratorium the merchants are quietly ignoring
Forced-labor barracks logged as decommissioned with the head count still going up
Pilgrim hostel whose off-season bookings spike before every flare-watch alert
Mortuary cold storage running two more drawers warm than the duty list explains
Sealed first-wave habitat ring still pressurized at recently-set life-support parameters
Salvage court evidence locker on a docket the listed judge isn't sworn to handle
Civilian shelter overflow on a sublet from a broker whose name is redacted on the lease
Drone foundry maintenance pit running a print queue four jobs ahead of the work order log
Customs scale shed whose calibration certificate expired three quarters ago
Black-budget shipping cradle accepting deliveries that arrive unmarked and leave with seals
Listening post whose duty roster has the same officer signed in across two stations same hour
Habitat repair guild hall whose tool checkout register skips Wednesdays without explanation
Registry kiosk whose biometric scanner has been authenticating dead identities at a steady drip
Salvage flotilla mooring field where one ship has been awaiting tow for thirteen months
Fuel depot whose night-shift manifest doesn't match the day-shift's by a percentage point
Witness holding cell with a recording light that doesn't always turn off when the camera does
Repair bay annex working freighters whose registered owners are listed as deceased
Ration-line distribution dock where the daily allocation is set by a board nobody chairs
Chiral medicine pharmacy whose evening shipments come in on routes that don't appear by morning
Calibration-medium auction pit whose published lot weights round down a quarter-percent every time the buyer is a refinery cousin
Anchor-mass weighing circle that registers a different lot weight on the syndicate scale than on the navy's
Witness-core resale parlor whose intake clerk keeps a private list of which seals have been opened and re-pressed
Stabilizer-substrate broker's office where the eighteen-month delivery clock resets whenever the inventory floor is swept
Chiral plating showroom whose sample hatches are painted right-handed on one side and wrong-handed on the other
Anchor-mass cradle bay whose dockmaster signs the haul out under a name the gate authority retired four years ago
Bleed-bloom futures pit where the chalkboard for next Tuesday's window opened on Saturday's prices
